from services.gemini_service import \(
    GeminiService, GeminiUnavailableError,
    GeminiRateLimitError, GeminiInvalidResponseError, MODEL
\)
from google.genai.errors import ClientError, ServerError
from google import genai
from google.genai import types

assert MODEL == 'gemini-3-flash-preview', f'Wrong model: {MODEL}'

cfg = types.GenerateContentConfig\(
    system_instruction='test',
    max_output_tokens=2048,
    response_mime_type='application/json',
\)
print\(f'Model: {MODEL}'\)
print\('GenerateContentConfig: OK'\)
print\('All imports and checks passed.'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
from google import genai
from google.genai import types
import os, json
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)

client = genai.Client\(api_key=os.getenv\('GEMINI_API_KEY'\)\)

BOOK_SCHEMA = {
    'type': 'array',
    'items': {
        'type': 'object',
        'properties': {
            'title':  {'type': 'string'},
            'author': {'type': 'string'},
            'reason': {'type': 'string'},
            'year':   {'type': 'integer'},
        },
        'required': ['title', 'author', 'reason'],
    },
}

response = client.models.generate_content\(
    model='gemini-3-flash-preview',
    contents='Recomiéndame exactamente 3 libros de ficción. PROPÓSITO: Disfrutar.',
    config=types.GenerateContentConfig\(
        system_instruction='Eres un experto librero. Recomienda libros reales que existen.',
        max_output_tokens=2048,
        response_mime_type='application/json',
        response_json_schema=BOOK_SCHEMA,
    \),
\)

print\(response.text\)
data = json.loads\(response.text\)
print\(f'Parsed {len\(data\)} books'\)
for b in data:
    print\(list\(b.keys\(\)\), '->', b.get\('title'\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source venv/Scripts/activate && python -c "
from services.pipeline import RecommendationPipeline
import json

pipeline = RecommendationPipeline\(\)
result = pipeline.run\({
    'purpose': 'enjoy',
    'mood': 'intense',
    'genres': ['thriller_misterio'],
    'length': None,
    'language': None,
    'freetext': 'algo oscuro y psicológico',
    'profile': None,
}\)

print\(f'Books returned: {len\(result[\\"books\\"]\)}'\)
print\(f'Meta: {result[\\"meta\\"]}'\)
for b in result['books'][:3]:
    print\(f'  - {b[\\"title\\"]} / {b[\\"author\\"]} | cover={b[\\"cover_url\\"] is not None} | desc={b[\\"description\\"] is not None}'\)
" 2>&1)
